title: GOP Sen. Thom Tillis unleashes on Noem: ‘Time after time, I’ve been disappointed’
author: Rebecca Beitsch
fullText: Sen. Thom Tillis (R-N.C.) tore into Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem in a 10-minute tirade criticizing her from everything to her handling of the deaths of two Minnesotans to killing her own dog in a monologue that garnered applause from the audience of the Senate Judiciary Committee. “I’m giving you a performance evaluation here –…
summary: Sen.
